# Instruction: csharp

## Scope
Use for C# 13 and .NET 9 backend code.

## Rules
- Enable nullable reference types and treat warnings seriously.
- Prefer records for immutable transport models.
- Keep methods focused; extract complex logic into services.
- Use async APIs end-to-end for I/O paths.
- Validate external inputs before domain processing.

## Quality
- Add unit tests for business logic.
- Favor explicit naming over terse abstractions.
